description_long: This object consists of a row of six square pillows, each with a slightly plump, soft appearance and subtle creasing along the edges. The pillows display a variety of solid colors, including muted gray, olive, deep red, blue, and a glossy maroon, suggesting a mix of fabric and possibly faux leather materials. The surfaces of most pillows appear matte or semi-matte, except for the maroon one, which has a shinier, more reflective finish. The pillows are arranged side by side, each maintaining a distinct separation, and their forms are slightly irregular, indicating a soft, compressible filling. No visible patterns, logos, or tags are present on any of the pillows. The overall presentation is clean and the pillows appear well-maintained.
description: A row of six square pillows in various solid colors and finishes, including matte and glossy surfaces, all appearing soft and clean.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six pillows side by side, clearly displaying their colors and surface finishes.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness and plumpness of the pillows, with their edges and slight bulges visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the pillows, with their shapes and colors still visible but less detail on surface texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the thickness and soft, compressible nature of the pillows.
